scheme_name: Incentive for the Intra Caste Marriage within Scheduled Caste Community
page_title: Incentive for the Intra Caste Marriage within Scheduled Caste Community

details: The Karnataka Social Welfare Department provides an incentive to promote intra-caste marriages within different sub-castes of Scheduled Castes (SC) and Scheduled Tribes (ST). The scheme offers ₹2,00,000/- for such marriages, with an option for ₹1,50,000/- if the simple marriage grant is availed. This initiative aims to reduce casteism and foster unity within SC/ST communities in Karnataka.
benefits: ₹2,00,000/- if an SC/ST boy or girl marries a person from a different SC/ST sub-caste.
₹1,50,000/- if the couple has availed of the simple marriage grant.
The incentive is provided in two installments:
50% as a fixed deposit with a minimum term of 3 years.
eligibility: The couple should belong to different sub caste of SC.
The bride and groom should be residing in Karnataka.
The family income of the applicant should not exceed ₹2,00,000/-.
The age of the bride should be between 18 to 42 years at the time of marriage.
The age of the groom should be between 21 to 45 years at the time of marriage.

online: Select "Incentives to Inter-caste Marriages" and Click "Register"
Using your "Aadhaar Card Number" Register with us providing all required Information.
After Registration, an SMS will be sent to the couple and they can print the acknowledgment form as proof of application.
Social Welfare will do spot verification to verify the details provided by the couple and process the application further.
After successful spot verification by the department, the incentive will be credited to the joint account of the couple.
Application must be submitted within one year of marriage.

documents_required: Aadhaar Card (Both spouses must provide their Aadhaar numbers).

faqs.question: What is the incentive amount for intra-caste marriages?
faqs.answer: The incentive is ₹2,00,000/- for intra-caste marriages between different SC/ST sub-castes.

faqs.question: How much incentive is provided if the simple marriage grant is availed?
How is the incentive disbursed?
faqs.answer: The incentive is disbursed 50% in cash and 50% as a fixed deposit.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe individuals marrying within different SC/ST sub-castes in Karnataka.

faqs.question: Are recipients of inter-caste marriage incentives eligible?
faqs.answer: No, they are not eligible for this scheme.

faqs.question: Is there a time limit for applying after marriage?
faqs.answer: Yes, applications must be submitted within one year of marriage.

faqs.question: Can I apply for this scheme online?
faqs.answer: Yes, registration and application submission are done online.

faqs.question: What happens after the application is submitted?
faqs.answer: The Social Welfare Department will verify the details, and the incentive will be credited to the couple’s joint account upon approval.

faqs.question: How will I be informed about my application status?
faqs.answer: An SMS will be sent to the registered mobile number after registration.

faqs.question: Can the incentive be claimed for marriages before April 1, 2018?
faqs.answer: No, only marriages on or after April 1, 2018, are eligible.
